Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Declined out of all SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Number of SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' activities

Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Number of SW-Reviewer Declined that are preceded by Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1

Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Number of SW-Reviewer Declined in relation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Declined done after SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average number of SW-Reviewer Declined per case in variants ending with SW-EIC Reject
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Declined' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-EIC Reject'

Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable' occurs

Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' occurs

Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of the path SW-AE Assign Reviewers -> SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Percentage of cases containing SW-Reviewer Declined that eventually reach SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Average number of SW-Reviewer Declined per manuscript review process case
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Declined occurring after a Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Number of SW-Reviewer Declined grouped by the total number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in the case
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' occurs
